overview.description: MDS Foundations provides foundational CSS classes for layout, typography, and more.

usage.description: Import the whole foundations.cSS file to use all CSS classes across your project, or import specific files as needed.

api.description: Media query utilities for responsive design based on media view port or container. Supported breakpoints include: - Extra small (xs): 0 - 640px - Small (sm): 640px - 1024px - Medium (md): 1025px - 1440px - Large (lg): 1441px - 1920px - Extra large (xl): 1921px and above
